cause_analysis.narrative: TeoDerma - Laser, Waxing, Electrolysis, and Skin Care churned on 2026-04-01 after 55 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 24-day silence starting 2025-12-13. Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-02-20 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
